# Network Interconnect

Faster, more reliable, and more secure than connecting over the Internet

> Links below point directly to Markdown versions of each page. Any page can also be retrieved as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header to the page's URL without the `index.md` suffix (for example, `curl -H "Accept: text/markdown" https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/`).
>
> For other Cloudflare products, see the [Cloudflare documentation directory](https://developers.cloudflare.com/llms.txt).

## Overview

- [Cloudflare Network Interconnect](https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/index.md): Connect to Cloudflare with private network interconnects.

## Get started

- [Get started](https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/get-started/index.md): Connect your network privately to Cloudflare

## Monitoring and alerts

- [Monitoring and alerts](https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/monitoring-and-alerts/index.md): Monitor CNI status and configure maintenance alerts

## Operational guidance

- [Operational guidance](https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/operational-guidance/index.md): Maintenance windows and troubleshooting guidance for CNI

## Changelog

- [Changelog](https://developers.cloudflare.com/network-interconnect/changelog/index.md): Review recent changes to Cloudflare Network Interconnect.
